rationale: Keep: the citing paper’s core mechanism is processing ease/fluency driving brand outcomes (and a reversal under negative valence), which directly aligns with the cited paper’s central findings on conceptual/perceptual fluency effects on brand evaluation and valence-contingent reversals. The exact DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.41.2.151.28665) supports this as a likely substantive theoretical/mechanism reference rather than an incidental mention.
